description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-toggle-button` (T2-29). 3/6 libraries. NOTE: PR #175 required.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-toggle-button/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, pressed/unpressed state typing, value typing for toggle groups
2. Accessibility — `aria-pressed` (true/false), NOT `aria-checked` (that's for checkboxes), keyboard (Enter/Space toggle), works in toggle group context, axe-core pass
3. Tests — pressed/unpressed toggle, form value when pressed, disabled, group context
4. Storybook — pressed/unpressed, icon-only, with label, group demo
5. CSS — pressed state visual distinction (not just color), `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-toggle-button/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-toggle-button — T2-29 antagonistic quality review
